question: How does India trade with the world?

theme.label: Economy and public money
readerQuestions: What is the headline economic number?
Is this a total number or a per-person number?
How much of the story is prices, exchange rates, or GDP share?
What does this explain about household life?

plannedCharts.title: How much India trades, 1948 to today
plannedCharts.subtitle: WTO · merchandise exports and imports · current US$
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: The headline: the scale of India's goods trade and how recently it took off.

plannedCharts.title: India's goods trade deficit
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: India buys more goods than it sells, and the gap has widened.

plannedCharts.title: How open India's economy is
plannedCharts.subtitle: World Bank · trade as a share of GDP
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: Trade matters more to India than the raw dollars suggest — measured against the size of the economy.

plannedCharts.title: India's slice of world exports
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: The single clearest measure of India's rise as a trading nation.

plannedCharts.title: Real vs nominal export growth
plannedCharts.subtitle: WTO · merchandise export value vs volume index
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: How much of India's export 'growth' is real, and how much is just higher prices.

plannedCharts.title: India's trade per person
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: The per-person reality check behind the big aggregate numbers.

plannedCharts.title: Who pays for the goods deficit?
plannedCharts.subtitle: WTO + World Bank · annual flows with the world
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: The deficit story is incomplete without the two flows that fund it.

plannedCharts.title: The net trade balance
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: Goods and services combined — a truer picture than goods alone.

plannedCharts.title: The remittance lifeline
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: India is the world's largest recipient of remittances — money sent home by its diaspora.

plannedCharts.title: What India sells abroad, by product
plannedCharts.subtitle: WTO · merchandise exports by product group · current US$
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: The export basket is not what most people picture: manufactures lead, and refined fuels became huge.

plannedCharts.title: Where India's exports go
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: India's top customers, ranked.

plannedCharts.title: Where India's imports come from
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: India's top suppliers, ranked — a very different list from its customers.

plannedCharts.title: India's biggest export products
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: What actually leaves India's ports, by product chapter.

plannedCharts.title: India's biggest import products
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: What India most depends on buying from abroad.

plannedCharts.title: The latest monthly trade
plannedCharts.subtitle: WTO · monthly merchandise trade · current US$
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: The freshest read on India's goods trade, month by month.

plannedCharts.title: What India buys abroad, by product
plannedCharts.subtitle: WTO · merchandise imports by product group · current US$
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: The import basket explains the deficit: it is dominated by energy and capital goods India cannot yet make at home.

plannedCharts.title: India's terms of trade
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: Whether India gets more or less for what it sells, relative to what it buys.

plannedCharts.title: India's lopsided trade with China
plannedCharts.subtitle: UN Comtrade · India–China merchandise trade
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: No bilateral relationship shapes India's deficit more than China's.

plannedCharts.title: The Russia trade surge
plannedCharts.subtitle: UN Comtrade · India–Russia merchandise trade
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: How fast a single geopolitical shift can redraw a trade map.

plannedCharts.title: Where India's exports go, by region
plannedCharts.subtitle: UN Comtrade · merchandise exports by region · benchmark years
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: India's export map, and how it has spread across regions.

plannedCharts.title: Where India's imports come from, by region
plannedCharts.subtitle: UN Comtrade · merchandise imports by region · benchmark years
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: India's supply map is far more concentrated than its sales map.

plannedCharts.title: India's two export engines
plannedCharts.subtitle: WTO · goods vs commercial-services exports · current US$
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: India's services exports have grown into a rival of its goods exports — unusual for a developing economy.

plannedCharts.title: India punches far harder in services
plannedCharts.subtitle: WTO · India's share of world exports, latest year
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: The single most important fact about India's trade: it matters more to the world in services than in goods.

plannedCharts.title: Inside India's services exports
plannedCharts.subtitle: WTO · commercial-services exports by category · current US$
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: Services exports are overwhelmingly one thing: software and business services.

plannedCharts.title: Services keep gaining share
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: The long shift toward services in what India sells the world.

plannedCharts.title: How IT-heavy India's services are
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: A second source confirming the software story.

plannedCharts.title: India among services exporters
plannedCharts.subtitle: WTO · commercial-services exports · current US$
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: Where India ranks among the world's services-export powers.

plannedCharts.title: The Asian divergence: shares of world exports
plannedCharts.subtitle: WTO · share of world merchandise exports since 1990
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: The defining comparison: economies that began near India's trajectory and pulled away.

plannedCharts.title: How open, India vs Asian peers
plannedCharts.subtitle: World Bank · exports of goods & services as % of GDP
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: Export-led economies bet their whole growth model on trade; India did so far less.

plannedCharts.title: Tariff walls: India vs peers
plannedCharts.subtitle: WTO · MFN applied tariff, simple average
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: Part of why India trades less: it is one of the more protected large economies.

plannedCharts.title: India among manufacturing peers
plannedCharts.subtitle: WTO · merchandise exports · current US$
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: How India's goods exports compare with its Asian manufacturing rivals.

plannedCharts.title: India's import tariffs
plannedCharts.subtitle: WTO · MFN applied tariff, simple average
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: How protected India's market is — the policy backdrop to its trade.

plannedCharts.title: India as a global buyer
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: India's weight in world trade as a customer, not just a seller.

plannedCharts.title: The external balance
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: Whether India, overall, lives within its external means.

plannedCharts.title: How high-tech India's exports are
plannedCharts.whyThisChart: The sophistication of India's manufactured exports.

selectionRules: Start from the page question, not from the indicator name.
Choose the smallest set of visuals that explains scale, trend, structure, comparison, and caveat.
Prefer mobile-friendly charts: line charts with sparse ticks, horizontal bars, share strips, pyramids only when essential, and no dense tables.
Use one strong pull quote only when the evidence supports it with a number.
Add glossary blocks for technical terms that normal readers may not know.
caveats: Use only figures present in lockedNumbers or sourceSummaries.
If a related theme indicator is present, you may use it for context, but do not pretend it is the main answer.
If source coverage is thin, say so directly.
Do not compare states, districts, or cities unless the evidence packet contains those geographies.
forbiddenClaims: Do not infer causality from a trend unless the evidence explicitly supports it.
Do not cite a source that is not present in sourceSummaries.
